parsed_verdict.reasoning: The combined Stage 1+2 response presents 10 top-level rules (matched across both stages), comfortably within the N9 parsimony threshold. Each rule covers a distinct phenomenon (natural place, heaviness ranking, lightness, medium resistance, heavier-arrives-sooner, shape effect, rest/forced motion, load effort, projectile fading, celestial exception) with no two paraphrasing the same claim, satisfying N10. All rules trace to specific observations (cited explicitly: obs. 1-12) and stay within permitted Aristotelian elaborations (natural place, medium resistance, fading impressed motion, heaven/earth split), satisfying N11. Cross-rule references are abundant (e.g., 'see rule 9', 'per rule 2', 'governed instead by rule 6', 'rules 1–9'), satisfying N12.
